message:
test(engine): enrichment tests for revocation chain, replacement lineage, and governance audit

revocation_chain.rs (+184 lines):
  Tests for append-only hash-linked monotonic-head revocation history.
  Validates Revocation decision records, RevocationEvent timestamped wrappers,
  RevocationHead pointer semantics. Detects and rejects hash-chain breaks
  and sequence regression. Serde roundtrips and clone equality tests.

replacement_lineage_log.rs (+254 lines):
  Tests for signed replacement-lineage log with transparency-verifiable append
  semantics. Validates replacement receipt construction, predecessor hash
  linking, sequence number monotonicity, and Merkle-tree commitment for
  inclusion/consistency proofs. Clone equality and boundary tests.

portfolio_governor/governance_audit_ledger.rs (+239 lines):
  Tests for governance decision tracking and portfolio change audit trail.
  Validates traceability and compliance verification across authority
  modifications. Clone equality, serde roundtrips, and deterministic ordering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
